description: A single matrix entry is insufficient. The code checks, for each prime p up to 17,389, whether h1 preserves any 1-dimensional subspace of F_p^2 by iterating through all lines and confirming non-invariance — a basis-independent invariant-subspace analysis. No invariant line found for any p.
